'''mabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oafishly|oafishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oafishly|oafishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mabate|mabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mabatesher|mabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabatesherĂ«m|mabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mabatero|mabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mabateshĂ«|mabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabateshĂ«m|mabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimabatero|gokimabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimabateshĂ«|gokimabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabateshĂ«m|gokimabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomabankerom|gomabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomabankeshĂ«|gomabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabankeshĂ«m|gomabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomabankeya|gomabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mabaterom|mabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabatemu|mabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mabateya|mabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimabaterom|gokimabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabatemu|gokimabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimabateya|gokimabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mababate|mababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mababatesher|mababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mababatesherĂ«m|mababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mababatero|mababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mababateshĂ«|mababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mababateshĂ«m|mababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimababatero|gokimababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimababateshĂ«|gokimababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimababateshĂ«m|gokimababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomababankerom|gomababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomababankeshĂ«|gomababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomababankeshĂ«m|gomababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomababankeya|gomababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mababaterom|mababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mababatemu|mababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mababateya|mababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimababaterom|gokimababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimababatemu|gokimababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimababateya|gokimababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠte|mĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠtesher|mĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠtero|mĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠtero|gokimĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠterom|mĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠtemu|mĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠteya|mĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠterom|gokimĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠbĂŠteya|gokimĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafbafte|mafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafbaftesher|mafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafbaftesherĂ«m|mafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafbaftero|mafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafbafteshĂ«|mafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafbafteshĂ«m|mafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafbaftero|gokimafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafbafteshĂ«|gokimafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafbafteshĂ«m|gokimafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafbafnkerom|gomafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafbafnkeshĂ«|gomafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafbafnkeshĂ«m|gomafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafbafnkeya|gomafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafbafterom|mafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafbaftemu|mafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafbafteya|mafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafbafterom|gokimafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafbaftemu|gokimafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafbafteya|gokimafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
